testcase.name: testAddUser

error.message: Error adding user: not implemented by SQLite JDBC driver

testcase.error: java.lang.RuntimeException: Error adding user: not implemented by SQLite JDBC driver at com.inventory.dao.UserDAOImpl.addUser(UserDAOImpl.java:30) at com.inventory.service.UserService.addUser(UserService.java:64) at com.inventory.UserServiceTest.testAddUser(UserServiceTest.java:63) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) Caused by: java.sql.SQLFeatureNotSupportedException: not implemented by SQLite JDBC driver at org.sqlite.jdbc3.JDBC3PreparedStatement.unsupported(JDBC3PreparedStatement.java:448) at org.sqlite.jdbc3.JDBC3Statement.getGeneratedKeys(JDBC3Statement.java:357) at com.inventory.dao.UserDAOImpl.addUser(UserDAOImpl.java:27) ... 5 more
